description: chiasmus (mirror/ring) structural test; frozen before tablet contact

features.augmented: allograph-normalized base code (reported; never rescues a robust null)

provenance.k_chi: minimal literary chiasm + corpus collision-prob chance floor (p_c=0.0091)

report_caveat: Consistent with chiastic (mirror) structure in the arrangement of signs. This is a structural property; it does not establish that the section is poetry, ritual, or any genre, and asserts nothing about content, sound, or meaning.

signature.statistic: max over (center,span) of perfect contiguous mirror depth

stopping_rule: final pre-registration; result is recorded; defect justifies re-run only if proven on synthetic data to flip a known-correct answer
